# Dhandapani Farms

> Premium agriculture marketplace from Tamil Nadu — fresh farm produce, native livestock, and verified agricultural real estate direct from a trusted family-run farm established in 1985.

Dhandapani Farms connects buyers with a family-run farm in Kangayam Taluk, Tirupur District, Tamil Nadu. The marketplace lists organic produce (grains, fruits, vegetables, seeds, spices), native livestock breeds (Gir, Kangayam cows, Tellicherry goats), and agricultural land / farm estates across Tamil Nadu.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of the marketplace, featured produce, livestock and land.
- [Products](/products): Fresh produce catalog — grains, fruits, vegetables, seeds, spices, trees.
- [Livestock](/livestock): Native breed cows, goats, buffalo, sheep and poultry with verified sellers.
- [Real Estate](/real-estate): Verified agricultural land and farm estates for sale in Tamil Nadu.
- [Contact](/contact): Location, phone, WhatsApp and email for inquiries.

## Guides

- [Guide to buying agricultural land in Tamil Nadu](/blog/guide-to-buying-agricultural-land-tamil-nadu): Legal steps, Patta Chitta verification, and land conversion rules.

## Optional

- [Sign in](/auth): Account access for buyers.
